description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Petrified</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>석화</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>石化</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Frozen</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>빙결</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>凍結</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使敌人陷入<color=#28d9ed>冰冻</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAfter the caster takes their turn, has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to Counterattack, until the caster's next turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신이 턴을 획득한 이후, 다음 턴 동안 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color>의 확률로 반격합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分がターンを獲得した後、次のターンの間<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で反撃する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n自身获得回合后,下一回合有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率发动反击。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> chance to reduce cooldowns by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> when hit.\nGrants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> at the start of battle.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n피격 시 쿨타임을 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소시킵니다.\n전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color> 상태가 됩니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃を受けた時、<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>の確率でスキルターンを<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>減少させる。\n戦闘開始時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n受到攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的几率使冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n战斗开始时,获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
